projects.title: School Portal
projects.text: A school portal website with editable courses, posts and users. Group project with 4 other developers. Project made in JS and PHP.

projects.title: City Weather Search
projects.text: A site to search for the weather of any city. JS Code uses API calls, heavy multi-functional DOM manipulation and loops.

projects.title: Git Hub Repo Search
projects.text: An app for searching Github repository lists of users. Built in React, the code includes useState, useEffect, multiple components and hooks.

projects.title: Star Wars Quotes
projects.text: A Star Wars movie quote generator. Code includes Javascript DOM manipulation and AJAX.
